steps.title: Identify the goal and the key information
steps.content: The student needs to identify the painting Shannon won for. The notes specify the title: Miss Kitty. To accomplish this goal, the answer must include that title.

steps.title: Match the answer choices to the goal
steps.content: Choice D names Shannon's winning painting as Miss Kitty—exactly what the goal requires. The other choices lack this essential identification; A and B provide only contextual background about the prize and institution, while C vaguely references a painting without naming it. That matches choice D — D is correct.
